title: Outbox / Stuck-pending detection (S72 W2, S73 W1)

panels.title: Stuck-pending count (aggregate, S81 W2 gauge label)
panels.description: Pending outbox messages older than threshold_seconds (default 300s = 5min). Worker не забирает = deadlock/crash/CPU starvation. S81 W2: per-transport gauge label — этот panel показывает aggregate (transport=_aggregate_). Для per-transport см. panel #4 (by-transport breakdown).

panels.title: Stuck-pending trend (last 6h, aggregate)
panels.description: Time-series outbox_stuck_pending_count{transport=_aggregate_}. Должен быть 0 в normal operation. Любой non-zero spike = worker problem. Для per-transport см. panel #4 (by-transport).

panels.title: Threshold (S)
panels.description: Configurable threshold. Alert fires when stuck-pending count > 0 в течение 5 min. См. outbox_stuck_pending_alert.json для rule definition.

options.content:
# OutboxStuckPending — Runbook

## Что значат алерты (S81 W3)
- **OutboxStuckPendingHigh** (warning, S73 W1): aggregate > 0 за 5 min
- **OutboxStuckPendingCritical** (P0, S73 W1): aggregate > 100 за 15 min
- **OutboxStuckPendingByTransportHigh** (warning, S81 W3): any single transport > 50 за 10 min

## Quick checks
1. ps aux | grep outbox (worker running?)
2. psql -c SELECT transport, COUNT(*) FROM outbox_messages WHERE status='pending' AND created_at < now() - interval '5 min' GROUP BY 1
3. journalctl -u gd-integration-tools --since '5 minutes ago' | grep -i outbox
4. См. per-transport panel #5 — где bottleneck (kafka/s3/etc.)

## Common causes (per-transport)
- **kafka**: broker down / network partition / consumer group rebalance
- **s3**: rate limit / network / credentials expired
- **clickhouse**: connection pool exhausted / slow disk
- **rabbitmq**: queue full / consumer dead

## Recovery
1. Restart worker: systemctl restart gd-integration-tools
2. Если transport-specific — проверить transport-specific health
3. Если persistent — manual flush (DANGEROUS, только с ops approval)

panels.title: Stuck-pending BY transport (S81 W3, ND-001 step 6)
panels.description: Per-transport breakdown outbox_stuck_pending_count{transport!=_aggregate_}. Каждая line = один transport (kafka/s3/rabbitmq/etc.). Позволяет быстро определить какой transport имеет bottleneck. Aggregate суммируются на panel #2.
